name: Drill Arena
short_description: Fight in a brutal battle between robots with drills. In the arena there are only you and your opponents. Only the most sturdy and agile robot will survive!
detailed_description:
Fight in a brutal battle between robots with drills. In the arena there are only you and your opponents. Only the most sturdy and agile robot will survive!

Features

  • Online steam multiplayer for 2-6 players
  • 3 types of robots to play with different advantages and disadvantages
  • Custom color of your robot
  • Opponents are equal to you in terms of capabilities and will use all methods available to you for survival
about_the_game:
Fight in a brutal battle between robots with drills. In the arena there are only you and your opponents. Only the most sturdy and agile robot will survive!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, Japanese
